ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., book, cd) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the product (e.g., sales, cost, rating) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for inventory control */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x15x5) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product type image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales team, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sale was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose inventory changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive for addition, negative for removal) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the inventory change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
